goal_text: Task 06057: You want to find a cheap restaurant and it should be in the west part of town. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. Make sure you get the address and phone number of the venue.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
